elements.text: Fruit-tree analogy: pay and nurture now → harvest income later. Death benefit exists during accumulation, but this is not full CI/death/hospitalisation protection.

• Limited-pay retirement endowment

• Coverage shown: SGD 250,000

elements.text: If a major health event happened tomorrow, how many years of retirement savings would be needed to cover the costs — and how would that affect the desired retirement lifestyle?
